fix_plan: Change the outer container div in RoomIntroOverlay.tsx from 'fixed inset-0' to 'absolute inset-0' so the overlay is positioned relative to the canvas container (which is position:relative) instead of the browser viewport. This is the minimum one-word CSS class change that constrains the overlay to the 640x480 game canvas area.
diff_summary: Changed 'fixed' to 'absolute' in the outer container div className
notes: Root cause confirmed: 'fixed' positions relative to viewport, 'absolute' positions relative to nearest positioned ancestor (canvas container).

fix_plan: Change 'fixed inset-0' to 'absolute inset-0' on the three overlay divs in BreachDefensePage.tsx (START SCREEN at line 702, GAME OVER at line 801, VICTORY at line 862). The canvas container parent is already position:relative, so absolute positioning constrains these overlays to the 640x480 canvas area. NotificationToast is intentionally fixed and is not touched.
diff_summary: Changed 'fixed' to 'absolute' on three overlay container divs (start screen, game over, victory)
notes: Root cause confirmed: 'fixed' positions relative to viewport causing full-browser-width overlays. 'absolute' constrains them to the canvas container.

fix_plan: Update EducationalItemModal.tsx CSS classes to match the retro styling standard: change modal container to bg-white border-4 border-black with hard pixel shadow, add font-['Press_Start_2P'] to title/fact/button text elements, replace <Button> component with native <button> styled like CodexModal's retro button (pink bg, border-4, pixel shadow, active press effect), change inner card to bg-[#F0F0F0] border-black, and constrain max-width to 580px. Remove unused Button import.
diff_summary: Replaced system font/themed color classes with Press Start 2P pixel font, black borders, hard pixel shadows, and retro button styling matching existing CodexModal pattern
notes: Root cause confirmed: component predated retro styling standard. Matched patterns from CodexModal.tsx and PatientStoryReveal.tsx for consistency.
